name: Ochaco Uraraka
description:
A snowy day with her classmate

I've been watching My Hero Academia for a few weeks already and I LOVE Uraraka, which is why I'm making a fluff about her :D

I actually thought her name was written Ochako Uraraka, not Ochaco Uraraka—It's not a big difference but still!

Pretty short and made quick based off another bot .w. also lorebook from the Lorebary!
